MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DFENDANTS CESAR VITARI AND NUTRAGOODS INTERNATIONAL LLC'S DEMURRER TO AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege facts in support of each element of each statutory violation claim. The Court will not make any ruling as to the propriety of duplicative claims until all claims are sufficiently alleged.
